---
title: "AI × Security Notes"
description: "An evolving notebook of experiments and ideas at the boundary of machine learning and cybersecurity."
author: "Kader Mohideen"
date: "2025-01-01"
categories: [AI, Machine Learning, Cybersecurity]
---

## Summary

A running notebook of experiments and ideas at the intersection of machine learning and cybersecurity — concept notes, small Python experiments, and reading summaries from my MBA in AI & Data Science and the IIT Madras AI/ML certificate.

## Topics in scope

- Anomaly detection on network and DNS telemetry
- LLM-assisted security analyst workflows (triage, summarization)
- ML for phishing and malicious URL classification
- Adversarial ML — model evasion and poisoning relevant to security tools

## Status

Early — most write-ups will land on the [blog](../../blog.qmd) as standalone posts and be cross-linked here.
